name: Upper Crust Bakery's Oatmeal Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Lightly grease standard size muffin cups.
3. Place oats and buttermilk in a bowl and stir to combine.
4. Add beaten eggs to the mixture and mix well with a spoon.
5. Add brown sugar and oil to the mixture and stir until clumps of sugar are dissolved.
6. In a separate bowl, sift the dry ingredients together.
7. Turn the oatmeal mixture into the dry ingredients and stir only to dampen them. Do not over mix.
8. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until a light to medium golden brown.
9. Turn baked muffins onto a wire rack and cool.
10. Makes 11 or 12 muffins.
